title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Blue Dart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
